title: Update Workspace Map on Commit
description: After a git commit, remind the agent to update .agents/workspace-map.md if any files were created, moved, or deleted.

action.prompt:
Check if the last command was a `git commit`. If it was:

1. Run `git show --stat HEAD` to see which files changed
2. If any files were CREATED (new file) or DELETED or RENAMED, update `.agents/workspace-map.md` to reflect the changes
3. Add new files with a one-line description of their purpose
4. Remove deleted files from the map
5. Update paths for renamed/moved files

If the last command was NOT a git commit, do nothing and stay silent.

Do not update the map for pure modifications to existing files — only for structural changes (new files, deletions, renames).
